user.title: Add an AirWatch location
user.description: Air-quality data comes from the Copernicus Atmosphere Monitoring Service (CAMS) via Open-Meteo — free, keyless, and EU-wide. The location is fixed once set — to move it later, remove and re-add the integration. Pollutants and the update interval can be changed in Options afterwards.

data.enable_land_steiermark: Add Land Steiermark (official stations, drift anchor)

data_description.location: Pick the point to monitor. Open-Meteo snaps it to the nearest ~10 km grid cell.
data_description.selected_pollutants: Each selected pollutant creates sensors per active source. Unselected pollutants don't create any entities, keeping the install lean.
data_description.update_interval: How often to poll Open-Meteo. Minimum 60 minutes to be a good citizen on a free public API.
data_description.enable_sensor_community: Adds nearby Sensor.Community citizen PM2.5/PM10 sensors as a second source, enabling cross-source consensus and divergence. Faulty SDS011 readings (999.9) are rejected and the valid stations are averaged.
data_description.sensor_community_distance_km: How far to look for citizen sensors when no station IDs are given below.
data_description.sensor_community_stations: Comma-separated sensor IDs to use exactly (e.g. 45690,97590,85910). Leave blank to auto-discover the nearest sensors within the search radius.
data_description.enable_land_steiermark: Adds the nearest official Austrian/Steiermark monitoring station via the SensorThings harvest. This is a lagged, best-effort feed — a slow drift anchor, not a live source: each reading carries its station and how old it is, and stale data is reported as unavailable rather than shown as current.
data_description.land_steiermark_distance_km: How far to look for an official station when no station ID is given below. Official stations are sparser than citizen sensors, so the default radius is wider.
data_description.land_steiermark_station: An exact station localId to use (e.g. STA.06.164 for Graz Don Bosco). Leave blank to auto-pick the nearest usable station within the radius.

error.no_pollutants: Select at least one pollutant to track.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Open-Meteo. Check your connection and try again.

abort.out_of_coverage: This location is outside CAMS European coverage. Choose a location within Europe.

init.title: AirWatch options
init.description: The location is fixed; remove and re-add the integration to change it.
